Hello there whoever is reading this if you are I have been hearing some very toxic behavior in public lobbies and there is nothing us normal players can do so I was wondering if I could possibly help you out by being a mod. I don’t care if I have the stick or whatever Or finger painter I just want to make the game a better place and experience . I am a small content creator and love your game so please and thank you. And please be careful and aware of some of the moderators because I got false banned for 48 hours for saying it’s a ghost so please be aware everyone of what you say anyway please and thank you goodbye.🙏🏽
